CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry.Status
 
CancelledListFragment - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Lists entrants with status DECLINED or CANCELLED for the current event.
CancelledListFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.CancelledListFragment
Creates a new CancelledListFragment and binds it to the cancelled_list layout.
CHANNEL_ID - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationChannelHelper
 
clear() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterCriteria
Clears all filter constraints so defaults apply on each screen.
com.example.eventlottery - package com.example.eventlottery
 
CommentAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Comment list adapter.
CommentAdapter(Context, List<String>, boolean, CommentAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.CommentAdapter
Creates a new CommentAdapter.
CommentAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener - Interface in com.example.eventlottery
Callback fired when the delete button on a comment row is clicked.
CoOrganizerManagementActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Allows the primary organizer of an event to assign or remove co-organizers.
CoOrganizerManagementActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.CoOrganizerManagementActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
CountAndCountHowManyPendingAndWin() - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantMainScreenActivity
Counts the number of events where the entrant has a pending, accepted, or invited status, and passes the per-event status map to the adapter so invitation CTAs are shown correctly.
createChannel(Context) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationChannelHelper
